title: Specify manifest-meta.yaml
description: Validates the structure of `.specify/cache/manifests/manifest-meta.yaml` — the manifest mirror's provenance stamp, the structural twin of `codex/codex-meta.yaml`. Written whenever the manifest cache is populated or refreshed; read by the CLI to decide whether the cache is populated.

source.description: The adapter source value the mirror was populated from. Local sources use a `file://` URI; git sources use the full URL including `@ref` when present.

fetched_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp (UTC) of when the mirror was written.
